title: tylophora ovata var. lanyuensis
intro: Tylophora ovata var. lanyuensis is a plant species known as a type of asclepiadaceous vine, belonging to the Tylophora genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory and inflammatory conditions. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. In traditional herbal preparations, Tylophora ovata var. lanyuensis is often used to make teas, extracts, and infusions that are consumed to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory ailments.
